title: tium misellum
intro: Tium misellum, also known as the bitter melon or gac, is a type of fruit-bearing vine native to Africa and Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of tium misellum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various health conditions. Tium misellum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
